examples: The boy was morbidly sensitive, with a hallucinatory imagination.
They will be doing it for us, and our morbidly projected fears for our own bodies.
Overweight begins at a BMI measurement of 25, obese at 30 and morbidly obese at 40.
Another artist joked morbidly that one day Picasso would be found hanging behind "his giant canvas".
Overall 6.3% of US women - that is one in 16 - are morbidly obese.
